about.description: Graphic Designer with 5+ years of experience specializing in branding, visual identity, and digital design. I craft compelling visual narratives that resonate with audiences and elevate brands to the next level. My work blends strategic thinking with aesthetic excellence — creating designs that are not just beautiful, but meaningful and effective.
about.quote: Design is not just what it looks like — it's how it works.

skills.title: Branding & Identity
skills.desc: Logo design, brand guidelines, visual systems

skills.title: Motion Graphics

timeline.desc: Leading brand identity projects, mentoring junior designers, managing client relationships. Overseeing multi-channel campaigns from concept to delivery.
Created visual identities, marketing materials, and digital assets for various clients across tech, fashion, and hospitality industries.
Started freelancing, building portfolio with logo design, social media graphics, print materials, and brand consultation.
